prompt: Make a two-panel meme. Panel 1 with 1st image and text 'How I look on LinkedIn'. Panel 2 with the 2nd image and text 'How I solve problems in real life.' Use bold white text in meme style, placed at the top of each panel.
prompt_refined:
Generate a two-panel meme, arranged vertically.
The top panel should feature image 1 (a man in a suit jumping excitedly). Overlay the bold white text "How I look on LinkedIn" at the top-center of this panel.
The bottom panel should feature image 2 (a man with a watermelon helmet and goggles). Overlay the bold white text "How I solve problems in real life." at the top-center of this panel.
All overlaid text must be in a standard meme font.
objects: Top panel containing a man in a suit jumping excitedly
Bottom panel containing a man with a watermelon helmet and goggles
Bold white text "How I look on LinkedIn" at the top-center of the top panel
Bold white text "How I solve problems in real life." at the top-center of the bottom panel
Standard meme font for all overlaid text
